sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4195" key="a(lihxh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁλι-ηχής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n4195.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">resounding like the sea</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0576.tlg001:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Musae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
